files.contents:
# Flash Cards App (Express + Tailwind)

Minimal starter initialized for the Flash Cards app.

Requirements
- Node.js 18 or newer

Setup
1) Install dependencies:
   npm install

2) Initialize git repository (if not already):
   git init

3) Start development (server + Tailwind watch):
   npm run dev
   Open http://localhost:4566

4) Run tests:
   npm test

5) Build CSS for production:
   npm run build:css

Notes
- The server listens on port 4566 by default. Set PORT env var to override.
- Static files are served from the public/ directory.

Flash Cards

Project initialized. UI will be built in subsequent steps.

notes: Run `npm install` to generate node_modules and lockfile.
Initialize the git repository with `git init` after creating the project folder.
Start development with `npm run dev` and open http://localhost:4566.
Tests run with the built-in Node.js test runner: `npm test` (requires Node 18+).
